# Contributing to @geeeger/ocusage

Thank you for your interest in contributing!

## Development

1. Fork and clone the repo
2. Install dependencies:

```bash
npm install
```

3. Make your changes in the source files (`cli.mjs`, `db.mjs`, `report.mjs`)
4. Test locally:

```bash
node cli.mjs
node cli.mjs --date 2025-04-20
node cli.mjs --json
```

## Pull Requests

- Keep changes focused and small
- Test your changes before submitting (`npm test`)
- PR title must follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) — CI will enforce this
- Do NOT manually edit CHANGELOG.md — it is auto-generated by release-please

### Commit Message Format

All commits are validated locally via commitlint + husky (`npm install` auto-configures the git hook).

```
feat: add --csv output          # minor version bump
fix: correct date parsing       # patch version bump
feat!: rewrite DB layer         # major version bump (BREAKING CHANGE)
docs: update README             # no version bump
chore: update dependencies      # no version bump
```

Types: `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `style`, `refactor`, `perf`, `test`, `chore`, `ci`, `build`

## Reporting Issues

Use the [issue templates](https://github.com/geeeger-pkgs/ocusage/issues/new/choose) to report bugs or request features.
